package handler

import (
	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"net/http"
)

// Positive scenario for gin_engine_as_global_singleton
// Rule intent: Package-level *gin.Engine singletons reused across unrelated startup paths.
var GlobalEngine *gin.Engine

func PositiveGinEngineAsGlobalSingleton(c *gin.Context) {
	GlobalEngine = gin.Default()

	GlobalEngine.GET("/health", func(c *gin.Context) {
		c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"status": "ok"})
	})

	GlobalEngine.GET("/users", func(c *gin.Context) {
		c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"users": []string{}})
	})

	GlobalEngine.Run(":8080")

	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"message": "engine initialized"})
}
